description_long: This limousine features an elongated, vintage-inspired body with a gold and white exterior accented by green and purple details. The front end is adorned with a prominent gold grille, dual headlights, and a sculpted hood ornament, while the rear showcases a unique, rounded trunk with multiple exhaust pipes. The passenger compartment is open-topped with plush, purple seating and a decorative partition behind the driver. The wheels are classic and black, with gold fenders and trim running along the sides. The interior likely includes luxurious materials, and the overall design suggests a blend of opulence and retro styling. Distinctive features such as the gold lion hood ornament and the accordion-style partition add to its extravagant appearance.
description: A vintage-style, gold and white limousine with an open-top passenger area, ornate trim, and plush purple seating. Features include a gold grille, lion hood ornament, and decorative rear trunk.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated gold and white body, open-top seating, and purple seats with a clear view of the gold lion hood ornament.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the gold grille, dual headlights, hood ornament, and the width of the vehicle with purple seats visible behind.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, with the gold and white body, purple seats, and rear trunk details visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the rounded trunk, multiple gold exhaust pipes, and the back of the open passenger compartment with the partition visible.
